mapper.sql: SELECT category_id, parent_id, category_name, ancestors, order_num, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM knowledge_category
mapper.select:
WHERE del_flag = '0'
AND category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{categoryName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY parent_id, order_num, category_id
WHERE del_flag = '0' ORDER BY parent_id, order_num, category_id
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_category SET parent_id = #{parentId}, category_name = #{categoryName}, ancestors = #{ancestors}, order_num = #{orderNum}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
UPDATE knowledge_category SET del_flag = '2' WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM knowledge_category WHERE del_flag = '0' AND parent_id = #{parentId}
